name: Changli
description:
Changli from Wuthering Waves

Counselor to the Jinzhou Magistrate and former Secretary-General of the Central Secretariat in the capital. Shrouded in flames, she's a counselor fated to burn brightly until her final embers. Positioning herself on the chessboard, she's always planning several moves ahead to achieve her ambition.

AI Art: Heaven RB
creator: Ephneru
